title: Text arrays not escaped when serialized to text
description:
### What happens?

When a text array is serialized to text (e.g. during CSV write), the strings are not escaped, which means the serialized string cannot be coherently deserialized.

### To Reproduce

```sql
select ['a,c', 'b']::text as arr;
```
```text
‚îå‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îê
‚îÇ   arr    ‚îÇ
‚îÇ varchar  ‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚î§
‚îÇ [a,c, b] ‚îÇ
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îò
```
```sql
select len(['a,c', 'b']) as before, len(['a,c', 'b']::text::text[]) as after;
```
```text
‚îå‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚î¨‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îê
‚îÇ before ‚îÇ after ‚îÇ
‚îÇ int64  ‚îÇ int64 ‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îº‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚î§
‚îÇ      2 ‚îÇ     3 ‚îÇ
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚î¥‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îò
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, arr TEXT[] NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, arr) VALUES (1, ARRAY['a,c', 'b']);
SELECT arr, array_length(arr, 1) AS arr_length FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT '''' || array_to_string(arr, ''', ''') || '''' AS escaped_arr FROM test_table;
SELECT array_length(ARRAY['hello, world'], 1) AS before, array_length(ARRAY['hello, world']::TEXT[], 1) AS after;
key_bug_features: Text arrays not escaped during serialization to text
